chapter_title.en: The Severity of a Believer’s Afflictions

text: 22 - عن أبي حمزة قال: قال أبو جعفر (ع) إنّ للهِ (جلّ جلاله) ضنائنَ مِن خلقِه يضنّ بهم عن البلاء؛ يحييهم في عافية ويرزقُهم في عافية ويُميتهم في عافية ويبعثُهم في عافية ويُدخلهم الجنّةَ في عافية.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 22. It has been reported by Abu Hamzah that Abu Ja'far (a.s) said: Allah has some chosen ones amongst His creatures whom He spares from afflictions. He keeps them alive in well-being, sustains them in well-being, causes them to die in a state of well-being, shall resurrect them in well-being and admit them into Paradise in well-being.
